name: London
industries: Financial services, government delivery, technology scale-ups and the consulting firms serving them all drive certified hiring.
intro: London's project market is really several markets sharing a skyline: banking and insurance programmes in the City and Canary Wharf, government delivery portfolios across Whitehall, tech scale-ups from Shoreditch to King's Cross, and the consultancies that staff all of them. Competition for delivery roles is international, day-rate contracting is a way of life, and certification is the currency both permanent and contract markets price openly — PMP for programme governance, Scrum credentials for digital delivery. Live online batches run year-round with sensible London timings — a full Saturday–Sunday weekend cohort plus a midweek Wednesday–Thursday option — so you train during comfortable local daytime hours; the schedule table below lists every upcoming date with its exact London start and finish. Afterwards we handle exam application guidance, full-length mocks, and trainer access for doubts until you clear.

faq.q: What are the class timings in London?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM GMT+1 in London. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in London?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in London. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from United Kingdom?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in United Kingdom and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in London sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in United Kingdom accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in London — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for London: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
